name: Tax Court Judge Retirement Election

eligibility.description: Must be a Tax Court judge meeting specific age (65-70) and service (10-15 years) requirements and file a written election.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Tax Court judges can elect to receive lifetime retired pay based on years of service, which also triggers a lump-sum credit of prior civil service retirement contributions.
